title: ephedra viridis
intro: Ephedra viridis, also known as Mormon tea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ephedraceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ephedra viridis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as a natural diuretic. Ephedra viridis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and capsules, making it a popular choice among those seeking natural remedies for various health conditions.
